items.text:
✨Lights. Music. Magic. We’re casting K-Pop Demon Hunters tributes! ✨ 

Do you have the energy, stage presence and performance skills to bring a high impact K-Pop act to life? 

Since the launch of our K-Pop Demon Hunters tribute act - it has been a HUGE hit!!! From more intimate smaller parties, to large scale events and festivals…even beyond the UK! 💜 

Due to such high demand, we are now looking for more performers to join our K-Pop team… a high energy, professionally choreographed act performing across the UK and beyond. 

We are looking for performers who:
✨Are age 18+
✨Are able to authentically and respectfully represent the characters heritage
✨Are reliable, professional and committed 
✨Have great stage presence and energy 
✨Dancing and singing abilities are a bonus (but not essential as all training is provided)
✨A valid UK passport is required for any work beyond the UK 

About the roll:
✨Paid performance opportunities 
✨Competitive rates of pay
✨Full training provided 
✨Events include birthday parties, private events, on stage performances, festivals and much more 
✨High quality costumes provided 
✨Be part of a supportive team 

Must be UK based and able to travel

This is not just a character roll - it’s a high energy act making dreams come true 💖💫 

If this sounds like you, we would love to hear from you! 

To apply, please email:

Wishuponastareventsltd@gmail.com

Or message us directly on Facebook 

Wish Upon a Star Events

We can’t wait to hear from you! 💜

#Kpop #performing #Acting #Dancing #Singing #Makingmagicalmoments #wishuponastar #dreams #casting #castingcall #hiring #magical #events

items.text:
# **PAID IMMERSIVE ACTORS WANTED | WEST SUSSEX | OCTOBER 2026**

**Something strange is happening in West Sussex this October...**

Hi, I'm Davey, founder of **Ezra Immersive**.

After almost 20 years creating scare attractions, immersive theatre and live horror experiences for companies across the UK, I'm launching my own immersive theatre company, and I'm looking for performers to help bring our very first experience to life.

**RSVP** is a 75-minute immersive horror experience where audiences become guests at Tommy Crimble's 10th birthday party...

Again.

What starts as an awkward, painfully British birthday party slowly descends into something far more sinister.

Think **The League of Gentlemen** meets **The Texas Chain Saw Massacre**, with the escalating tension of **Resident Evil 7**, wrapped inside an interactive immersive theatre experience where comedy gradually gives way to horror.

We're casting five unforgettable characters:

• ***Tommy Crimble ***– the birthday boy who's definitely turning ten...
***• Pauline*** – the relentlessly cheerful mum determined to throw the perfect party.
***• Keith*** – the painfully polite father who believes there's a right way to do absolutely everything.
***• Nana ***– mostly asleep... until she isn't.
***• Kev*** – the painfully cringe party entertainer who's trying his best to keep the party going.

We're looking for performers who love creating characters, improvising with audiences and embracing both comedy and horror. Experience in immersive theatre, scare attractions or interactive performance is a bonus, but attitude, creativity and strong instincts are far more important.

**These are paid roles** based in **West Sussex**, with performances taking place across October 2026.

If this sounds like your kind of weird...

Head to my **Linktree** below and click **"Casting Call – RSVP"** for the full casting pack, character breakdowns, performance dates and application details. Or drop me an email at **hi@ezraimmersive.com**

See you at the party.

https://linktr.ee/Daveyfoxezra

items.title: 10.07 piątek

items.text:
WARSZAWA 2026
Cześć! Szukamy aktorów i aktorek do krótkometrażowej etiudy fabularnej realizowanej w ramach Warszawskiej Szkoły Filmowej.
„MIĘDZY BLOKAMI" to klimatyczna, trzymająca w napięciu historia dziewczyny, która wraca na rodzinne osiedle, by odnaleźć zaginioną przyjaciółkę i przekonuje się, że nikt poza nią nie chce jej szukać.
Kogo szukamy:
SKLEPIKARZ (45–60) – kluczowa rola drugoplanowa. Na pozór zwykły właściciel sklepiku, ale z drugim dnem. Mężczyzna poważnej, masywnej postury.
MATKA OLI (45–60) – matka zaginionej, wyczerpana samotnymi poszukiwaniami. Powściągliwa, mocna wewnętrzna gra.
SĄSIADKA (60–75) – epizod z jedną świetną kwestią. Starsza pani w typie klasycznej mieszkanki bloków, kamienna twarz.
Szczegóły:
📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa, 20-26.07.2026
📩 Zgłoszenia: wyślij kilka zdjęć (portret + sylwetka), krótką informację o sobie i ewentualne doświadczenie na adres: polajaniec@onlineszkolafilmowa.com.pl lub w wiadomości prywatnej 
⏰Prosimy o zgłoszenia do 12.07

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'MIEDZY BLOKAMI'

MATKA OLI (45–60) – matka zaginionej, wyczerpana samotnymi poszukiwaniami. Powściągliwa, mocna wewnętrzna gra.
SĄSIADKA (60–75) – epizod z jedną świetną kwestią. Starsza pani w typie klasycznej mieszkanki bloków, kamienna twarz.
Szczegóły:
📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa, 20-26.07.2026
📩 Zgłoszenia: wyślij kilka zdjęć (portret + sylwetka), krótką informację o sobie i ewentualne doświadczenie na adres: polajaniec@onlineszkolafilmowa.com.pl lub w wiadomości prywatnej 
⏰Prosimy o zgłoszenia do 12.07

🚨 Urgently Looking for Musicians and performers – Dubai 🎵
Rudraksh Live Band is looking for a Keyboardist and Drummer for a paid live performance.

📅 Performance: Tuesday

🕖 Time: 7:00 PM – 11:00 PM

📍 Location: Dubai

If you’re available, reliable, and comfortable performing Bollywood, Sufi & Unplugged live music, please DM or WhatsApp immediately.

📞 Daksh Thakur (Founder)

056 315 5338

Serious musicians only. Please share this post if you know someone who might be available.

items.text:
RUSTED Proof of concept test shots 
A Gritty Sci-Fi/Fantasy Epic
THE LOGLINE 
In a universe where time is a fractured machine, a rugged Time-Traveling Treasure Hunter must form a desperate alliance with his deadliest rival to stop a rotting, god-like anomaly from consuming all timelines.
THE CONCEPT
RUSTED is a high-stakes, R-rated cinematic experience that merges the tactile, lived-in grit of Children of Men with the reality-bending, cosmic scope of Dune. This is not a clean, sterile future; it is a world of decay, where ancient history and advanced technology collide in a violent, rusting entropy.
The Visual Aesthetic: The film’s signature look is "Pitted & Corroded." We see the ruins of a medieval cathedral, but its stone arches are fused with orange and gold crystalline "Rust" and iridescent, scavenged tech. The visual language is one of salvaged survival.
THE INCITING INCIDENT: THE FRACTURE
The film opens in a silent, forgotten mythical treasure vault filled with powerful artefacts and mystical omnipresent gems. Without warning, a tear in reality erupts. A rotting, chemical-fallout-blotched ZOMBIE is violently dumped into the chamber. Its body is a horrifying fusion of necrotic flesh and jagged, cybernetic "Rust." Its form "glitches" through reality, skipping frames of animation as it struggles to manifest. This single event confirms that the decay is accelerating and that all of time and space is now vulnerable.  

THE CHARACTERS
Our story is driven by complex relationships against an epic backdrop.
ROWAN (30s-40s): The Weary Hunter
 Archetype: The Reluctant Guardian.
 Description: Rugged, weathered, intense. He wears the silent burden of fixing a broken timeline. He looks physically fit but utterly exhausted.
 Key Gear: He traverses history in a dark, armored duster coat and tactical gear. His defining feature is his iconic backpack—a complex, bulky, void-like rig made of dark, pitted metals, caked with "Rust." It pulses with internal blue-white energy coils, a piece of cobbled-together tech that allows him to survive the fractures.
ILYRA (20s-30s): The Lethal Weaver
 Archetype: The Blade of the Nexus.
 Description: Sharp, efficient, and coldly beautiful. Possesses an ethereal stillness. Her movements are precise and deadly.
 Power: She commands the gravity of a collapsed star. Her segmented, matte-black armor is accented with subtle purple-white light conduits that flare when she uses her abilities. Once Rowan’s partner, she now hunts him to preserve cosmic "stability."
KANEN (50s-70s): The Emotional Anchor
 Archetype: The Relic-Keeper.
 Description: A contact for Rowan living in the hollowed-out ruins of a medieval cathedral. He has a weathered, cynical face that wears the marks of a hard life.
 Role: He is the keeper of secrets and passes on the memento that alerts Rowan to the accelerating "Rust."
THE OVERLORD (40s-60s): The Architect of Chaos
 Archetype: The Desperate Tyrant.
 Description: Capable of projecting immense, menacing presence, even in silhouette or with a masked face.
 Role: A shadow-bound imperial obsessed with weaponizing the Power Stone to rewrite history. He is the architect of the chaos, desperately clawing for power as his world crumbles.
WHY THIS WORKS
 Genre-Defying: It appeals to both sci-fi and fantasy audiences, bridging the gap between Indiana Jones-style adventure and cosmic horror.
 Grounded Stakes: Despite the god-like threats and time travel, the core emotional conflict is personal: a fractured partnership and the desperate need for connection in a dying world.
 Iconic Visuals: The "Rusted" aesthetic and the "Glitching" action (fractured tempo) offer a unique visual language that hasn’t been seen on this scale.
We are not just building a film; we are building a franchise universe rooted in survival, legacy, and the heavy price of fixing a broken world.

Content Creation | Product Photography | Video Advertising

Casey Miners
Creative Director | Photographer
Toowoomba City
0432 282 150
www.instagram.com/chefs_camera

www.instagram.com/narrow_path_training_academy

HASAY ปิลช้านี้เอกณนใปทร Step into the fracture. Help define the Rusted universe. CREATIVE DIRECTOR PHOTOGRAPHER CASEY MINERS TOOWOOMBA CITY 04322821 50 wwwistnanacomemne PROJECT: RUSTED TALENT PROTOCOL COORD: 27. 4698° 51.9251°E(Toowoomba, (Toowoomba, QueensLand, Australia)'

Hello! Dan Bell Casting is casting Multi-Generational Latinx/Hispanic families for a national commercial.

Must be located in Los Angeles and native Spanish speakers! 

Please email us for self-tape audition instructions at danbellcastingoutreach@gmail.com.

SAG Commercial - (Pays each person approx. $830/day)

Auditions: ASAP

Fitting: 7/26/26-7/27/26

Shoots: 7/28/26-7/31/26

Location: Los Angeles, CA

Criteria:

1. Married Couple/Parents Ages 38-50

2. Two children ages 10-18 

3. An uncle/aunt ages 38-50

4. Their child (the cousin) ages 15-20 

5. One Grandparent ages 60-75

items.text:
There isn’t a handbook for raising a young performer but there is a lot to learn along the way! 🎭

Whether your child is attending their very first audition or already has professional experience, the industry can feel exciting, rewarding... and sometimes overwhelming.

That’s why we’ve put together a few reminders we believe every parent should know.

✨ Success isn’t just about booking the job.
✨ Keeping profiles and materials up to date matters.
✨ Most importantly, helping your child continue to love performing is the greatest success of all.

Behind every young performer is a parent, guardian or family member cheering them on, driving them to rehearsals, learning new industry terms and celebrating every milestone, big or small!

We hope this carousel helps you feel a little more informed and a little more supported on that journey.

💬 What’s one piece of advice you wish you’d been given when your child started performing?

📌 Save this post for whenever you need a reminder, and share it with another parent navigating the industry.

COMMENT ‘SELF TAPE GUIDE’ and we will send you our free guide 🤩

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of child and text that says 'KEEP YOUR CHILD'S PROFILE UP TO DATE. Headshots. Height. Playing age. Skills. → Children grow quickly and their profile should grow with them too!'
May be a graphic of text that says 'chorey SUCCESS ISN'T MEASURED → BY BOOKINGS. Confidence. Resilience. Creativity. Enjoyment. These are are just as important.'
May be a graphic of ‎text that says '‎cho Chi chorry pips ciees יחות 4 THINGS EVERY PARENT OF A YOUNG PERFORMER SHOULD KNOW cherrypipsacting.co.uk‎'‎

May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUR CHILD'S AGENT IS YOUR TEAMMATE. Keep them informed about: .Holidays •School commitments → •New skills Appearance changes Communication helps them submit your child for the right opportunities.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'LEARN HOW to SELF-TAPE. SELF- ΓΑΡΕ. Many first-round auditions now happen from home, so creating a simple self-tape setup is a valuable skill. Message us and we will send you our FREE SELF-TAPE GUIDE for for and young performers. parents'

Do nowego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Siwy, Maciej Jaworski (35) – typ drobnego przestępcy, który postanowił „awansować”. Bardzo jasne włosy, stąd ksywa. 9 scen  AKTOR  - PRAWO JAZDY
DATA:  22.07 i 23.07
STAWKA: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

- Porywacz (30)  – średniego wzrostu, przypakowany. 7 scen 
DATA:  22.07 i 23.07
STAWKA: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

- Grzegorz Jóźwiak (30) – typ korpo, opanowany, zamożny. 4 sceny 
DATA:  22.07 
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Bednar – Sylwester Bednarski (37) – szef gangu. Bezwzględny, zdeterminowany. Przeciętnej postury, króciutko ostrzyżony. Ubrany niepozornie – czarna koszulka, czarne spodnie. 3 sceny
DATA:  23.07 
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Tajniak (29) – policyjny tajniak. Ogarnięty, skoncentrowany na robocie. Wysoki, ale szczupły. 5 scen 
DATA:  23.07 
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Właściciel (45) – drobny przedsiębiorca. Prosty, uczciwy facet. 1 scena 
DATA:  22.07 
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Handlarz (50) – handlarz ludźmi, wygląd wyrachowanego kryminalisty. Wschodni akcent. 3 sceny
DATA:  22.07 
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Arkadiusz Borecki (39) – gangster. Skoncentrowany na wykonaniu zadania, bezwzględny. Krótko ostrzyżone włosy, masywny. 2 sceny PRAWO JAZDY
DATA:  24.07 
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Świadek (35) – przechodzień, który znalazł Boreckiego. Szczupły, wysoki. 3 sceny
DATA:  24.07 
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Gangster – Hubert Karecki (36) – prawa ręka Bednara. Masywny, lekko dłuższe włosy. 3 sceny – PRAWO JAZDY
DATA:  23.07 
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Wojtas – Ernest Grotecki (27) – jeden z ludzi Bednara. Wysoki, masywny. 1 scena
DATA:  23.07 
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia WYŁĄCZNIE MAILOWO na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

Poszukujemy czterech energicznych kobiet do zagrania ról epizodycznych w krótkim, humorystycznym skeczu pod Pałacem Kultury i Nauki (PKiN) na Instagrama
Jeśli lubisz kamerę i chcesz wziąć udział w fajnym projekcie, napisz na: pawelhitday@gmail.com

items.text:
PRACA DLA AKTORÓW (mężczyzn)🎭
Sezon teatralny 2026/2027

Poszukujemy ambitnych i zaangażowanych aktorów do wyjątkowych grup tworzonych przez ludzi z pasją i pozytywną energią!

📅 Okres pracy: wrzesień 2026 – czerwiec 2027
📍 Miejsce:  Spektakle gramy  na terenie całej Polski (sale widowiskowe)
🚐 Wyjazdy: niedziele z Krakowa
🏠 Powroty: piątki do Krakowa
🛌 Zapewniamy: transport i noclegi

🎬 O spektaklach:
Gramy profesjonalne, pełne energii spektakle repertuarowe dla dzieci i młodzieży. Produkcje przygotowywane są przez doświadczonych reżyserów i mają wysoki poziom artystyczny.

🎭 Czego oczekujemy:
✅ Doświadczenie sceniczne
✅ Dyspozycyjność od końca lipca 2026 (próby w Krakowie – płatne!)
✅ Zaangażowanie i pozytywne nastawienie

💡 Dodatkowe atuty (mile widziane, ale nie obowiązkowe):
🚗 Prawo jazdy kat. B
💻 Umiejętność obsługi sprzętu elektronicznego

💰 Oferujemy:
✔ Wysokie wynagrodzenie (adekwatne do doświadczenia)
✔ Płatne przygotowania i próby
✔ Fantastyczną atmosferę w zespole
✔ 100% satysfakcji z pracy na scenie!

📩 Zgłoszenia (CV + zdjęcie + wizytówka aktorska) prosimy przesyłać na adres:
📧 pracawteatrze@onet.pl

Do zobaczenia na castingach! 🎭

items.text:
Siemano! Poszukujemy 5 aktorów do filmu fabularnego, nagrywki startują 27 lipca i potrwają maksymalnie 5 dni, NON PROFIT.

Opis postaci i jakich aktorów potrzebujemy:

Młodzi ludzie, przedział 18-30 lat, dwóch mężczyzn, dwie kobiety + jedna osoba dodatkowo bez konkretnej preferencji płci.

WIEDŹMA 
Elegancka i charyzmatyczna kobieta o arystokratycznej prezencji. Inteligentna manipulatorka, która obsesyjnie pragnie kontroli i po zdjęciu klątwy przechodzi wyraźną przemianę w ciepłą, empatyczną osobę.

MŁODSZY BRAT
Wrażliwy i dobroduszny młody czarownik, który początkowo pozostaje w cieniu starszego brata. Z czasem dojrzewa do roli odważnego przywódcy kierującego się sprawiedliwością i chęcią pokonania zła.

STARSZY BRAT 
Charyzmatyczny, pewny siebie i urodzony lider, który bierze odpowiedzialność za innych i nie boi się stawić czoła niebezpieczeństwu. Bezwzględny wobec zła, a jednocześnie opiekuńczy wobec młodszego brata.

JASNOWIDZKA 
Spokojna i przenikliwa kobieta obdarzona wyjątkowym darem jasnowidzenia. Jest przewodniczką i doradczynią bohaterów, wskazując im drogę w walce ze złem.

POMOCNIK / POMOCNICZKA WIEDŹMY 
Mężczyzna / kobieta o wybuchowym temperamencie, który/a pod wpływem klątwy ślepo służy Wiedźmie. Po odzyskaniu wolności staje się spokojnym/ą i pomocnym/ą zielarzem/zielarków, chcącym/cą naprawić swoje błędy.

Zainteresowanych zapraszamy do kontaktu na priv / do napisania komentarza, opowiemy wszystkie szczegóły filmu i odpowiemy na pytania :))

topComments.text: Napiszesz na priv? Ja nie mogę.

items.text:
Hi, beautiful people! 💜

I'm hoping to tap into this amazing community for a connection.

Does anyone know a photographer in the Colorado Springs area who might be interested in donating their time for a very special local nonprofit event?

In October, Angels of America's Fallen is hosting a small, exclusive theatrical Halloween runway experience at Garden of the Gods benefiting children and families of fallen military service members and first responders. We’re hoping to capture the incredible costumes, red carpet moments, and the magic of the evening while helping raise awareness for an organization that provides long-term support to children of our fallen heroes.

We’re looking for a photographer who may be willing to donate some time to capture professional photos of the event. In return, they would receive recognition on social media, the opportunity to showcase their work, and the chance to be part of an unforgettable evening supporting an amazing cause.

If you know someone who might be interested—or if that's you!—I’d love to connect. Please comment below or send me a message.

Thank you so much! 🖤🎃✨

Having so much fun on Mondays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

items.text:
Letzte Chance dabei zu sein!
Offenes Jurycasting im Kloster Graefenthal in Goch

Die Suche nach neuen Talenten geht weiter!

Du begeisterst mit deiner Stimme, deiner Tanzperformance, Artistik, Comedy oder einem anderen außergewöhnlichen Talent? 

Dann nutze jetzt die Gelegenheit und präsentiere dein Können unserer Jury. 

Ganz gleich, ob Anfänger oder Bühnenerfahrung wir freuen uns auf alle Talente.

Jetzt: Sonntag, 12. Juli 2026

12:00 bis 18:00 Uhr

Kloster Graefenthal

Maasstraße 48–50

47574 Goch

Bitte bringe Folgendes mit:

• Gute Laune und Freude an deinem Auftritt

• Bei Gesang, Tanz oder Comedy: einen USB-Stick mit deinem Playback

• Musiker und Bands: eigene Instrumente, Verstärker und benötigte Anschlüsse

• Artisten und Akrobaten: alle für den Auftritt erforderlichen Requisiten

• Minderjährige können nur in Begleitung eines Erziehungsberechtigten teilnehmen.

Spontan teilnehmen? Kein Problem!

Eine vorherige Anmeldung ist nicht erforderlich. Du kannst einfach vorbeikommen und dich direkt vor Ort für das Jurycasting anmelden.

Wer sich seinen Platz bereits im Voraus sichern möchte, kann sich bequem online registrieren.

Online-Bewerbung & weitere Informationen:

www.evctalentcastingshow.de/bewerbung

Kennst du jemanden mit einem besonderen Talent?

Dann markiere die Person in den Kommentaren oder teile diesen Beitrag. 

Vielleicht beginnt genau an diesem Sonntag der Weg bis ins große Finale der EVC Talent Casting Show 2026.

Wir freuen uns auf einen abwechslungsreichen Casting-Tag und viele beeindruckende Talente!

items.text:
Seit 2014 gehört Cosplay fest zur Leipziger Buchmesse. In diesem Beitrag haben wir die Anfänge festgehalten, denn schon 2011 waren die Messehallen voller Manga-Comic- und Fantasiegestalten.

Cosplay has been an integral part of the Leipzig Book Fair since 2014. In this article, we capture its beginnings, as the exhibition halls were already filled with manga, comic, and fantasy characters back in 2011.

sharedPost.text:
Verdient ist verdient.

Gestern, am 08. Juli 2026, fanden in den Berliner und Brandenburger Grundschulen zahlreiche Abschlussveranstaltungen zur feierlichen Übergabe der Zeugnisse für die Sechstklässler statt, die ab dem nächsten Schuljahr 2026/ 2027 an die Oberschulen wechseln werden.
 
Zweiundzwanzig glückliche Kinder der Klasse 6a einer Lichtenberger Schule hatten besonderes Glück, denn sie fanden zum Abschied in ihren Zeugnismappen das erste Album der Synthi-Pop-Band BEYOND OBSESSION "Listen, Learn And Speak".

Wie kam es dazu ?

Durch Beziehungen hörten Nils und Marco von einer Klasse, die öfter während längerer Pausen heimlich auf dem Smartboard Videos der Band öffnete, sich immer wieder ein Video-Post des Fanclubs ansahen, bis etliche Schüler es auswendig nachsprechen konnten, zu "In My Blood" tanzten oder Beyond Obsession-Melodien im Unterricht vor sich hin sangen oder gar im öffentlichen Personennahverkehr fremde Menschen auf die Synthi-Band aufmerksam machten.

Beide Künstler fanden dies so witzig, dass sie nicht nur jedem Kind dieser Schulklasse spontan eine handsignierte CD schenkten, sondern obendrein eine namentliche Widmung hinzufügten.

An einem Sonntagnachmittag überreichte der Keyboarder Marco Bartz den CD-Karton an den Fanclub, der die Tonträger dann am Montag in die Schule brachte.

Nachdem am Abschiedstag den vielen Gästen in der dicht gefüllten Turnhalle von der Vorgeschichte der CD-Geschenke berichtet worden war, klatschten alle Kinder, Eltern, Großeltern und die anwesenden Lehrkräfte und Erzieher spontan Beifall.

Tom Meeloo

Price on enquiry.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype
"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name
🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.
🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach).

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill
📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):
Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."
The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"
Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.
Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.
Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call
📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable
🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point
📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew
🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.
Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)
🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape
📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:
Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.
Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.
Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:
Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.
Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux
📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

Final Performance (Day 4):
Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?
This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:
mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com
Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
🎬 EXTRAS CASTING CALL | “THE WEIGHT OF US”
We’re currently casting featured extras for The Weight of Us, an 11-minute proof of concept short film and Masters graduation film. 

Logline:

A rising North London boxer’s career-defining fight is thrown into chaos when her estranged father, a former champion battling addiction, unexpectedly returns, forcing her to confront the legacy she has spent years trying to escape.

Roles Available:

📰 Press / Journalists

* Playing Age: 28+
* Any ethnicity
* Any gender
* Featured background role covering a boxing event

🍺 Homeless Man / Drunk Man

* Playing Age: 40–50
* Any ethnicity
* Male
* Featured background role in a North London street scene

Shoot Dates:
📅 19–20 July (please state your availability when applying)

Location:
📍 The Selby Centre, Selby Road, Tottenham, London, N17 8JL

Expenses:
This is an unpaid opportunity as part of independent self-funded student production. Catering will be provided throughout the shoot.

If you’re interested, please email nicoleosayi@gmail.com, comment below or send me a DM with:

* Your name 
* Age
* Location
* Recent headshot
* Spotlight/CV (if you have one)

We’d love to hear from you! ⭐️

🎬 **CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM**

**TITLE:** Short Film Edmonton

**LOCATION:** Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

**SHOOT DATES:** Early August 2026 (TBD) — 4-day shoot

**PAID, UNPAID OR PROFIT SHARE:** Paid

**HOW TO APPLY:** Visit https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls for casting details.

Casting for a paid, non-union short film shooting in Edmonton, Alberta. The production is seeking Nepali actors based in Canada for two lead roles exploring themes of loneliness, connection, and resilience.

Non-union. Nepali actors based in Canada are specifically sought for both roles.

🎭 **ROLES**

**DIPEN – Lead**

Male | 25–30

• Nepali actor required

• An intelligent and caring architect who hides his loneliness behind routine and cooking

• After a life-changing cancer diagnosis, he must confront the emotional wounds he has avoided for years

**ANJALI – Lead**

Female | 20–25

• Nepali actor required

• A bright, ambitious intern who brings energy, optimism, and a fresh perspective into Dipen's life

🎥 **Details**

• Paid short film — non-union

• Location: Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

• 4-day shoot — Early August 2026 (dates TBC)

• Nepali actors based in Canada sought for both roles

📩 **HOW TO APPLY**

Apply via Actors & Extras as a Talent PRO member with a 1-month FREE trial:

➡️ https://actorsandextras.com/casting-calls

Know someone in Edmonton who should see this? Share it.

However, we strongly encourage all applicants to exercise due diligence and independently verify the details of the project before proceeding.*

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM "UNPROVEN" (Vancouver, BC)**

Hello! We're casting two lead roles and several supporting roles for ***Unproven***, an independent narrative short film set over one rainy night in a 24-hour Vancouver laundromat.

The film explores identity, migration, memory, and the fragile line between truth and performance. It is intended for the international festival circuit.

**Expected production:** late Sept/ early Oct 2026

**Non-Union, Volunteer (Meals and Credit provided)**

**Lead Role #1 – ISHAAN (Male, 20–25), South Asian**
Pakistani international student. Intelligent, observant, and quietly guarded. Ishaan is preparing for an asylum claim based on his sexuality, rehearsing a story he hopes will be believed. Beneath his composure lies uncertainty, vulnerability, and a dry sense of humour. Strong English required. Urdu proficiency is welcome but not required.

**Lead Role #2 – AH LONG (Male, 24–30), East Asian**
Hong Kong migrant working in Vancouver. Reserved, emotionally restrained, with a quiet wit. He carries unresolved grief while carefully avoiding conversations about his own past. **Native or fluent Cantonese and strong English required.**

**Supporting role - **FRIEND A (Male, 20–30)

International student. Charismatic, confident, and slightly mischievous. Sparks a conversation that unknowingly changes Ishaan's perspective.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting role- **FRIEND B (Any Gender, 20–30)

International student. Curious, skeptical, and quick to react. Serves as the emotional counterpoint during the dorm conversation.* English-speaking.*

**Supporting roles - SUPERMARKET COLLEAGUES (*Cantonese-speaking*)**

**OLDER MAN (Male, 55–70)**
Long-time Hong Kong immigrant. Friendly and well-meaning, though occasionally dismissive without realizing it.

**WOMAN (Female, 45–65)**
Warm and practical. Tries to ease tension among coworkers.

**YOUNGER COLLEAGUE (Male, 30–40)**
Recently immigrated from Hong Kong. Quiet, weary, and waiting for his immigration status. *Native or fluent Cantonese required.*

**LAUNDROMAT CUSTOMER (Female, 45–70)**

A middle-aged woman quietly folding laundry late at night. No dialogue. A subtle but important presence that grounds the space in everyday reality.

**FAST FOOD CUSTOMERS (Male, 20–40)**

Two ordinary men sharing a quiet moment over a late-night meal. No dialogue. Comfortable with subtle, natural physical interaction.

Previous acting experience is welcome but not required. We are looking for performers with a naturalistic screen presence.

To submit, please send to **unprovenfilm@gmail.com**:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape (if available)
• Contact information

Thank you!

items.text:
POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY NON PROFIT

14.07-18.07 WARSZAWA, SKIERNIEWICE

Krótki metraż z humorem opowiada historię stereotypu ojca postawionego w realiach systemu kaucyjnego. Film przedstawia powstałe przez zachowanie ojca problemy rodzinne oraz wynikającą z tego relację, zdanego na siebie rodzeństwa.

Do etiudy do portfolio do Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukiwanych jest 

czterech MĘŻCZYZN W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli ojca, dwóch jego kolegów i sąsiada

dwie KOBIETY W WIEKU 45-65 LAT, do roli sąsiadki ojca oraz żony jednego z jego znajomych

DZIEWCZYNA W WIEKU 19-24 LAT, do roli siostry

dwóch CHŁOPAKÓW W WIEKU 16-20 LAT do roli brata i jego znajomego

MAŁY CHŁOPIEC W WIEKU 8-12 LAT do roli dziecka spacerującego na chodniku

Proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej, na telefon: 607075035, lub na maila slawinskiantoni23@gmail.com

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**16-17-18 lipca**

**cdn.**

** **

Zapraszam na plany pierwszych dni zdjęciowych nowego serialu dla jednej z telewizji. Bardzo ogólnie – jesteśmy w temacie footballu. I daleko od fair play 

 

**16 LIPCA (czwartek)**

wyjeżdżamy ok. 30km za Warszawę, do Czernideł.

**- MIESZKAŃCY WSI** – wiek ok. 35-70 lat. W zasadzie brak górnej granicy. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką po planie

**- STATYŚCI Z AUTEM -  **wiek jak powyżej. Zdjęcia auta poproszę w zgłoszeniu. **Stawka 200** **zł **(120 zł + 80 zł) gotówką po planie

 

**17 LIPCA (piątek)**

gramy w Warszawie Wesoła, na cmentarzu pogrzeb jednego z ultrasów

**- MŁODE DZIEWCZYNY –** w typie dziewczyn z klubu ultrasów. Ładne, fajnie jak będą wydziarane, z pazurem. **Stawka 180 zł** za dzień zdjęciowy. **Kontynuacja 20 i 22 sierpnia.**

**- PRZYJACIELE ULTRASÓW –** panowie w wieku 18-45 lat. Typ kiboli. **Stawka 180 zł** za dzień zdjęciowy. **Kontynuacja 20 i 22 sierpnia.**

**- MINISTRANCI –** wiek 16 lat (ukończone) – 20 lat. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką

**- KOŚCIELNY / GRABARZE – **panowie 40+. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką

**- TAJNIACY -**  panowie ok. 30-50 lat. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką

 

**18 LIPCA (sobota)**

gramy na stacji benzynowej na Pradze. Sceny rodem z filmów akcji

**- SPRZEDAWCA –** mężczyzna ok. 30-40 lat. **Stawka 110 zł** gotówką

**- POLICJANCI I POLICJANTKA / TECHNIK POLICYJNY –** wiek ok. 20-40 lat. **Stawka 120 zł** gotówką. Rozmiar M i L panowie. Panie S i M

**- KLIENCI STACJI –** wiek i płeć zróżnicowane. **Stawka 110 zł **gotówką

**- STATYŚCI Z AUTEM -  **wiek jak powyżej. Zdjęcia auta poproszę w zgłoszeniu. **Stawka 180** **zł **(110 zł + 70 zł) gotówką po planie

** **

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS + wybrany dzień**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **aktualne** **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie najlepiej) i sylwetki**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
[WROCŁAW] POSZUKIWANI AKTORZY - PRACA W TEATRZE - UDZIAŁ W SPEKTAKLACH

Poszukujemy doświadczonej aktorsko osoby do roli młodego mężczyzny (postać w wieku ok. 20-35 lat) w spektaklach dla dzieci, młodzieży i dorosłych.

WYMAGANIA:

• dobre umiejętności aktorskie i swoboda w pracy przed publicznością,

• wysoka kultura osobista i komunikatywność,

• zaangażowanie oraz odpowiedzialne podejście do powierzonych zadań,

• dyspozycyjność od poniedziałku do piątku w godzinach porannych

• mile widziane dodatkowe umiejętności, np. śpiew, taniec, gra na instrumencie, umiejętności cyrkowe, itp.

OFERUJEMY:

• regularną współpracę

• komfortowy grafik - pracujemy głównie w godzinach porannych (kończymy około 12:00-13:00) + jedna sobota w miesiącu

• rozwój - możliwość udziału w różnorodnych projektach artystycznych

• atrakcyjne wynagrodzenie

JAK APLIKOWAĆ?

Prześlij CV na adres: magicznyteatr@onet.pl

items.text:
📣 **Parents, considering home education from September? **
***Feeling nervous? Not sure where to start?***

Hi 👋🏼
We are Josh & Aimee, owners of Swan Tutoring! An online, flexible education platform for home educating families 🏡

In August** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨ designed for those who are considering home education and are new to it, and those who have been home educating for a while!** You can try our engaging online classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

items.text:
🎬 FREE AUDITION LOG FOR ACTORS
I created a simple audition log that I thought some of you might find useful.

When I first moved to LA, I had 80 auditions in my first three months. Keeping a log made it much easier to stay organised, track my progress, and remember which casting directors I’d read for.

It’s an easy way to keep track of:
• The project
• The type of role
• The audition date
• The casting director
• Whether you got a callback or booked the role
• Notes and feedback
• How many auditions you’re actually getting

I find it’s much easier to spot patterns and see your progress when everything is in one place.

And it’s FREE.

If you’d like a copy:

1. Comment AUDITION below.
2. Send me a DM.

I’ll send it over. 😊

items.text:
Hello!
My names David and i’m based in the northamptonshire area. I have just completed a Level 3 extended diploma in musical theatre and I am taking a gap year before heading off to The Urdang Academy. 

I’m looking for smaller jobs in musical theatre or dance. I have experience in choreographing (Hair the musical teen edition and Contemporary dance teaching) and performing (Jane Seymour in six and mike costa in a chorus line) 

I’m 5’8, Blue/green eyes, Brown hair and a playing age of 16-21. 

Thank you in advance.

topComments.text: If you want a playing age of 16 I would have some shots minus make up in younger clothing as this shots makes you look older and its definitely a bonus to be able to play down

Would deffo reccomend getting on lots of Facebook casting pages especially local ones, follow casting directors and companies on insta etc! OpenAuditions is good to check in on too. 
Secret farm in moggerhanger is casting for their Halloween event, Wellingborough panto auditions are this weekend too, might be worth reaching out to them!!

items.text:
🎭 Calling all actors!

I've just launched my Actor's Planner a digital planner created by an actor, for actors.

If you're looking for a way to stay organised throughout audition season, this planner includes:

✨ Goal-setting & vision boards
🎬 Self-tape checklists
📝 Character preparation sheets
📅 Audition & callback trackers
⭐ Booking trackers & reflection pages
📇 Fillable industry contact pages

I created this because I know how much there is to juggle as an actor, and I wanted one place to keep everything organised and help us feel more prepared for every opportunity.

If this sounds like something that would help you, I'd love for you to check it out. 
Here’s the link 
🔗 https://shop.beacons.ai/aaa.productions/63876ea7-f6c6-43b7-8c90-8bfc491006c8

 Thank you for your support! ❤️

#Actors #ActingCareer #ActorLife #SelfTape #Auditions

items.text:
Poszukuję właścicieli najbardziej odjechanych, klimatycznych i nietypowych miejsc noclegowych w Polsce do programu TV ✨

Masz domek na drzewie, glamping w środku lasu, noclegi na łódce, chatki hobbitów, jurty, tiny house’y, obiekt w starym młynie albo miejsce, o którym goście mówią „co to w ogóle jest?!” 😍

Jeśli tworzysz wyjątkowy obiekt z charakterem i chcesz pokazać go szerszej publiczności - napisz do mnie prywatnie lub oznacz swoje miejsce w komentarzu 💌

Szukamy miejsc z klimatem, pomysłem i osobowością! ✨

Masz domek na drzewie, glamping w środku lasu, noclegi na łódce, chatki hobbitów, jurty, tiny house’y, obiekt w starym młynie albo miejsce, o którym goście mówią „co to w ogóle jest?!” 😍

Jeśli tworzysz wyjątkowy obiekt z charakterem i chcesz pokazać go szerszej publiczności - napisz do mnie prywatnie lub oznacz swoje miejsce w komentarzu 💌

Szukamy miejsc z klimatem, pomysłem i osobowością! ✨

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKUJEMY AKTORA (non profit)

Do realizacji filmu fabularnego „Samotność” poszukujemy aktora do jednej z kluczowych ról drugoplanowych.

MARCIN

Wiek ekranowy: około 25–30 lat

Marcin jest charyzmatycznym, energicznym, dobrze zbudowanym i bezpośrednim mężczyzną. Ma naturalne poczucie humoru, łatwo nawiązuje kontakt z ludźmi i często przykrywa poważne emocje żartem. Jest typem człowieka, który bez zaproszenia wejdzie do mieszkania przyjaciela, wyciągnie go z łóżka i zmusi do ponownego zmierzenia się ze światem.

Pod warstwą pewności siebie i przebojowości kryje się jednak lojalność, wrażliwość oraz silna potrzeba chronienia bliskiej osoby. W dalszej części historii Marcin przechodzi wyraźną przemianę – po pobycie w więzieniu staje się bardziej wycofany, napięty i czujny. Bohater mierzy się ze strachem, traumą oraz wydarzeniami, których nie potrafi racjonalnie wyjaśnić.

Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o przesłanie:

– aktualnych zdjęć,

– portfolio aktorskiego,

– showreela lub fragmentów dotychczasowych realizacji,

– informacji o wieku, miejscu zamieszkania i doświadczeniu scenicznym lub filmowym.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres:

skora.fil@gmail.com

W tytule wiadomości prosimy wpisać:

„CASTING – MARCIN – imię i nazwisko”

items.text:
# **Video Producer / Reżyser YouTube & Social Media**

Są projekty, przy których po prostu nagrywasz filmy.

I są projekty, które realnie wpływają na życie ludzi.

My tworzymy ten drugi.

Fundacja FitMIND pomaga osobom odzyskiwać zdrową relację z jedzeniem. Każdy materiał, który publikujemy, ma jeden cel – sprawić, żeby ktoś po jego obejrzeniu zrobił pierwszy krok do zdrowszego życia.

Wierzymy, że dobry content może edukować, zmieniać sposób myślenia i realnie pomagać ludziom.

Dlatego szukamy osoby, która dołączy do naszego zespołu jako **Video Producer / Reżyser**.

Nie szukamy operatora kamery.
Szukamy osoby z doświadczeniem, która samodzielnie przygotuje i poprowadzi cały dzień zdjęciowy – od planowania po realizację.
## **Na czym będzie polegała Twoja rola?**

Raz w miesiącu (czasami częściej) spotykamy się na dwudniowym weekendzie zdjęciowym w okolicach Serocka (około 40 minut od Warszawy). Każdy dzień zdjęciowy trwa około 10 godzin.

Na około tydzień przed nagraniami otrzymujesz scenariusze. Od tego momentu odpowiadasz za przygotowanie produkcji.

Do Twoich zadań będzie należało:
* analiza scenariuszy i zgłaszanie propozycji zmian,
* przygotowanie harmonogramu i planu zdjęciowego,
* organizacja sprzętu oraz przebiegu nagrań,
* prowadzenie planu zdjęciowego,
* reżyserowanie scen,
* dbanie o kadry, światło i estetykę materiałów,
* pilnowanie realizacji scenariusza.

Na planie chcemy, żebyś przejął/przejęła inicjatywę.

To Ty podejmujesz decyzje:
* „Nagrywamy.”
* „Jeszcze jedno ujęcie.”
* „Przechodzimy dalej.”

Ja jestem przed kamerą.
Ty odpowiadasz za wszystko wokół niej.
## **Kogo szukamy?**

Szukamy osoby, która:
* ma doświadczenie przy produkcjach wideo,
* jest świetnie zorganizowana,
* bierze odpowiedzialność za swoją pracę,
* działa samodzielnie i nie czeka na polecenia,
* potrafi rozwiązywać problemy,
* zna specyfikę YouTube i Instagrama,
* chce rozwijać się w produkcji contentu.

Nie oczekujemy perfekcji.

Oczekujemy odpowiedzialności, inicjatywy i chęci ciągłego rozwoju.

Dodatkowym atutem będą:
* portfolio,
* doświadczenie z aparatami Sony,
* szkoła filmowa.
## **Co oferujemy?**
* stałą współpracę (minimum 12 weekendów zdjęciowych w roku),
* pracę w małym, sprawnym zespole,
* realny wpływ na rozwój kanałów Fundacji FitMIND,
* możliwość rozwoju w produkcji YouTube i social media,
* współpracę B2B lub umowę zlecenie.

Nie wymagamy własnego sprzętu.

Na miejscu czekają:
* Sony ZV-E10 II,
* profesjonalne oświetlenie,
* mikrofony,
* statywy,
* przygotowana lokacja do nagrań.
## **Wynagrodzenie**

350–500 zł za dzień zdjęciowy (około 10 godzin), w zależności od doświadczenia i samodzielności.
## **Jak aplikować?**

Wypełnij krótki formularz:
[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeQiVIJYH-iQmtUWT4cfQ97LI8VqnxpjRM0CJBJXhXqGVCdKw/viewform?usp=header](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeQiVIJYH-iQmtUWT4cfQ97LI8VqnxpjRM0CJBJXhXqGVCdKw/viewform?usp=header)

W formularzu poprosimy Cię o kilka słów o sobie, portfolio lub przykładowe realizacje oraz odpowiedź na pytanie:

**Dlaczego to właśnie Ty powinieneś/powinnaś odpowiadać za nasze dni zdjęciowe?**

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do **17 lipca 2026 r.**

Jeśli chcesz tworzyć content, który realnie pomaga ludziom, i szukasz projektu z misją – czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie.

Ready to share the screen with a Hollywood legend? 🌟 An unbelievable new opportunity just hit the casting board, and production needs YOU to bring the energy to a massive sports scene! 🤯🎥

Rose Locke Casting is officially looking for Background Actors to portray family members at a Little League baseball game in the upcoming feature film 'Lizard Music,' starring Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson! Filming right in Brooks, Georgia, this is your ultimate chance to get on a major movie set, cheer from the bleachers, and secure a solid paycheck. Grab your sunscreen, bring your best stadium energy, and claim your spot in the stands! 🎫🔥

The Breakdown:
🎬 Project: Feature Film 'Lizard Music'
💰 Rate: $196/12 hrs
📍 Location: Brooks, Georgia 🍑
🎭 Seeking: all ethnicities

How to Apply:
Do not let this incredible on-set experience pass you by! ⏰ Tag your Georgia acting squad, share this to your story, and apply RIGHT NOW at: 👉 projectcasting.com/jobs 🔗

items.text:
Currently recruiting for the following 2x Cruise Ship Roles starting in August. Both cruises on Mediterranean Itinaries until late Sept then swapping to Caribbean. 

ASSISTANT CRUISE DIRECTOR/MALE VOCALIST (singing Male parts in show) 
 
4 months on, 2 months off. 

Salary is £2,552 per month. 
 
Ideal candidate would be a singer who wants to do more, or a host who misses singing. Happy to accept applicants from ships or starting out on ships if relevant role in the UK.
 
Single cabin with shared bathroom.
 
Same on board benefits as the Cruise Director – including eating in café / buffet restaurants.
 
The Role: We seek a talented and experienced 'Assistant Cruise Director / Vocalist'.

Description Brief:
The Assistant Cruise Director / Vocalist's primary role is to support the Cruise Director in overseeing and enhancing the entertainment experience on board.  They are also one of the main entertainers on board, so a strong vocal ability with own show is a must. This role includes performing in shows, generating fresh entertainment ideas, and ensuring guests enjoy a luxurious and engaging atmosphere. Strong hosting, socialising, and computer skills are essential for success in this role.

Minimum Requirements:
At least 2 years’ experience in a similar role
Strong vocal ability
High technical knowledge of sound and lighting
A team player and willing to 'get the job done'.
STCW 4 Basic Training
ILO approved Seafarer Medical Certificate
Valid Seamans Book
Relevant Visas for visiting countries – we can assist with these
If you have a talent for creating joy and offering genuine, heartfelt service, we encourage you to apply today.
 
Please send CV and showreel to Jmwstar@aol.com if interested xx 
 
 —————————————————————————
 
 HOST MUSICIAN (Start date August 16th TBC)
 
4 months on, 2 months off. Single cabin with shared bathroom.
 
Salary - £2,579 per month 
 
The Role:  We seek a talented and experienced 'Musician / Host', known as the ‘Entertainment Specialist’.

Description Brief: The Musician / Host is known on board as the Entertainment Specialist and their main role is to run entertainment and perform music. The Entertainment Specialist must be proficient in at least one instrument and should have a high standard of musical skill, great stage presence, and the ability to captivate audiences. The role involves performing daily music sets, running evening entertainment, liaising with Guest Entertainers, and maintaining a positive attitude to bring the best experience to our guests.

Minimum Requirements:
Proficiency in at least one instrument
High vocal ability
Engaging and charismatic personality
Able to adapt to new and changing situations
Relevant experience in similar role
STCW 4 Basic Training
ILO approved Seafarer Medical Certificate
Valid Seamans Book
Relevant Visas for visiting countries
If you have a talent for creating joy and offering genuine, heartfelt service, we encourage you to apply today.

Please send CV and Showreel to jmwstar@aol.com if interested xxx

sharedPost.text:
We are now casting  for our touring   Autumn show Viva Las Vegas .

The show is a musical  show featuring songs  of Sinatra, Judy Garland , Fred Astaire And Ginger Rogers  as well; as songs from Top Hat,  Easter Parade, The Wizard Of Oz  and more.

We are looking for an experienced hardworking M/F  performer who are keen to take quality musical shows to the community  based   venues .

The show is a one man/woman show so we are looking for experienced performers that can hold an audience and are looking for engaging vocalist performers.

Rehearsals- 24th -28th August  

Playing Dates- 31st  August  -30th October

We work Monday to Friday (2 x 60 minute shows per day)

Casting Breakdown

We are offering 700.00 per week plus fuel on the road as well as accommodation allowance  if needed on the road

Please send details including a singing reel  to info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk

items.text:
WE ARE CASTING FOR STUART SUTCLIFFE AND JULIAN LENNON! 🎸

Hello everyone! We hope you’re all doing well and enjoying the sunshine.

Would you like to be part of This Girl? We’re currently looking for someone to play the iconic role of Stuart Sutcliffe in our production.

If you, or someone you know, would be interested in taking on this exciting role, we’d love to hear from you.

For more information, please email: howl.michael1963@yahoo.co.uk

Please feel free to share this post with anyone who may be suitable.

Thank you! 🎭✨

CASTING BACKGROUND ASIAN FEMALE

Seeking Asian female talents (20-25 y/o) to be in **MAMM21** (Mighty Asian Moviemaking Marathon) Vertical Short Series Finalist project, “**Year After Year**”.

Volunteer | Non-union

**Shoot dates: ***July 18 & 19*

**Shooting Location:** Metro Vancouver, BC

*Meals & crafty will be provided on set*

**Submit to: **sally@yymediaco.com

**Subject line: **Year After Year Background - Your Name

Make sure to include your full name, contact information including your phone number, headshots, most recent size card and *availability confirmation for July 18 & 19.*

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE (ITALIAN SPEAKER)

A STRANGE DAY (SHORT FILM)

We are currently casting the lead role for A Strange Day, an independent short film developed between Germany and Italy and intended for international film festivals.

Looking for a young Italian football player—or someone who could convincingly be one—for the lead role

This project is fully self funded by the crew members so unfortunately this is an UNPAID role

ROLE: GUIDO CAPPELLI

Male | Playing Age 16–20

Guido is a 17-year-old Italian football player participating in an international youth tournament in Germany.

While his teammates focus on winning, Guido gradually becomes fascinated by the mysterious forests surrounding the sports complex. What begins as curiosity slowly turns into a journey through adolescence, imagination, isolation and self-discovery.

We are looking for someone with a natural screen presence and emotional authenticity rather than extensive acting experience.

REQUIREMENTS

✓ Fluent Italian speaker (required)

✓ Playing age 16–18

✓ Athletic build

✓ Football experience is welcome but not essential

✓ Strong expressive presence on camera

✓ Based in Berlin, or in nearest areas of Germany

ABOUT THE FILM

A Strange Day is a mystery inspired by youth football culture, personal memories, and the visual tradition of Italian Giallo cinema.

The film explores a universal feeling many people experienced growing up: the moment when you begin to drift away from the group around you and start searching for your own place in the world.

SHOOTING

Germany, Berlin

1-5th August 2026

TO APPLY

Please send:

•⁠  ⁠Headshot

•⁠  ⁠Recent photos

•⁠  ⁠Age and city where you based now

•⁠  ⁠Acting experience (if any)

•⁠  ⁠Football experience (if any)

Subject:

GUIDO CASTING – Your Name

Contact:

Hannahrynevich@gmail.com

Na dzień 22 lipca szukamy dublera aktora.

Włosy- ciemny blond, zarost
Wzrost około 180 cm
Wiek 40-55 lat
Sprawny fizycznie, z prawem jazdy

Stawka za dzień 250 zł

items.text:
CASTING MARKA SAMOCHODOWA

Poszukujemy:
Dziewczyn i Chłopaków - wiek 20-29 lat z pokolenia Gen Z (max do 33 lat ale trzeba wyglądać młodo).
Świeże, ciekawe twarze, młodo wyglądające.
Wyłącznie o określonym typie urody:
1. afroamerykańska z afro,
2. afroamerykańska z dowolną fryzurą
3. kaukaska z ciemnymi włosami
4. arabska
5. południowa
6. azjatycka
7. uroda mix etniczny

15.07.2026 RECALL WARSZAWA
30.07-01.08.07.2026 PRZYMIARKI WARSZAWA
03-04.08.2026 ZDJĘCIA WARSZAWA – 1 lub 2 dni zdjęciowe

Zgłoszenia na adres: [castingowezgloszenia@gmail.com](mailto:castingowezgloszenia@gmail.com)

📣 ***Home educating parents! We have lots of exciting online classes lined up for September! ***🤩
***Do any of these subjects take your interest?...***

Life Skills 🌱

Healthy Habits 🍎

Money Management 💷 - NEW

Business Builders 💡 - NEW 

English ✍️

Book Club 📚

Maths 🟰

Maths Fluency 🟰

Science 🔬

Psychology 🧠

Biology 🐸 - NEW

Piano 🎹

Guitar 🎸- NEW

Singing 🎶- NEW

Art 🎨

Reception 👶

Phonics 🗣️

History 🏛️

Geography 🌎

Social Studies 🪭

World Explorers ✈️

British Sign Language 🙌🏼

Mandarin Chinese 🇨🇳 - NEW

Spanish 🇪🇸

French 🇫🇷

GCSE 🎓

**The issue is though**, it can be tricky to know if your child will take to online learning, or to the subject! 🙈

Well, to help with this,** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨** where you can try these classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

Business Builders 💡 - NEW 

English ✍️

Book Club 📚

Maths 🟰

Maths Fluency 🟰

Science 🔬

Psychology 🧠

Biology 🐸 - NEW

Piano 🎹

Guitar 🎸- NEW

Singing 🎶- NEW

Drama 🎭 - NEW

Art 🎨

Reception 👶

Phonics 🗣️

History 🏛️

Geography 🌎

Social Studies 🪭

World Explorers ✈️

British Sign Language 🙌🏼

Mandarin Chinese 🇨🇳 - NEW

Spanish 🇪🇸

French 🇫🇷

GCSE 🎓

**The issue is though**, it can be tricky to know if your child will take to online learning, or to the subject! 🙈

Well, to help with this,** we are holding an **✨** Open Week **✨** where you can try these classes for just £3 (+VAT) per lesson per screen!**

☕️💬 There are also some FREE online **social events** included, giving you chance to meet other home educating families**.**

And receive a FREE **welcome pack** delivered to your door! 📦🏡

Let me know if you'd like more information! 😊
Best regards,
Aimee
Swan Tutoring

Grüßt euch,                                                                   
ein 14-jähriges Kind mit viel Motivation und wenig Erfahrung im Schauspielbereich, sucht Schauspieljobs, um Erfahrungen zu sammeln, damit sie einmal ihren großen Traum, ein beliebter Schauspieler zu sein erfüllen kann. 
Sie sucht Jobs ausschließlich in Bayern, falls jemand helfen kann oder eine Firma oder einen Filmproduzer kennt, bitte bei uns melden. 
Sprachen: Englisch, Deutsch und Ungarisch.
Wir würden uns sehr freuen! 
Vielen Dank für das Zuhören.                                           
  
Liebe Grüße❤️

items.text:
**CASTING CALL | Social-Media-Clip | Stuttgart | 19.07.2026**

Für die Produktion eines **Social-Media-Clips für eine aufstrebende Streetwear-Marke** suchen wir noch drei Darstellerfür einen Drehtag in **Stuttgart**.

**Gesucht werden**

**Arzt**
* männlich
* ca. 50–70 Jahre

**Empfangsmitarbeiterin**
* weiblich
* ca. 30–50 Jahre

**Patient / Patientin im Wartezimmer**
* ca. 50–80 Jahre
* gerne mit markantem oder besonderem Look
* ein eigener Hund ist ein Plus, aber kein Muss

**Dreh:** 19.07.2026
**Ort:** Stuttgart
**Drehdauer:** je nach Rolle ca. 1–3 Stunden
**Vergütung:** Gage, individuell je nach Rolle

Schauspielerische Erfahrung ist von Vorteil, aber keine Voraussetzung. Uns sind vor allem authentische Persönlichkeiten mit einer natürlichen Ausstrahlung wichtig.

Bei Interesse schickt uns bitte eine E-Mail an **[sven@versusarchive.com](mailto:sven@versusarchive.com)** mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Alter
* Wohnort
* ggf. kurzer Vita oder schauspielerischer Erfahrung

Falls ihr euch in den genannten Rollen nicht wiederfindet, aber trotzdem Lust habt, Teil des Projekts zu sein, schreibt uns gerne trotzdem. Wir sind auf der Suche nach interessanten Gesichtern und authentischen Persönlichkeiten für eine Szene im Wartezimmer.

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

STATISTER SØGES TIL DANSK SUPER8 SPILLEFILM - BYLDERUP-BOV (ULØNNET)
Vi søger statister til at agere landbrugsmedarbejdere til en dansk spillefilm som bliver optaget nær Bylderup-Bov. 

Optagelserne finder sted;

Søndag d. 12.. Juli kl 19:00 - 23:30

Mandag d. 13. Juli kl 11-21

Vi søger:

5-8 statister 

Alder: 40+

Køn: underordnet

Der vil være forplejning under optagelserne. 

Erfaring er ikke nødvendig, så længe man har gåpåmod og en sund interesse i at gøre vores film så god som muligt.

Er du interesseret, eller kender du én, som kunne være? Så send en mail til mig med:

- Navn

- Alder

- Telefonnummer

- Et vellignende billede af dig selv

Til mail: lv.studie@gmail.com

Jeg glæder mig at høre fra jer!

Mvh Lauge Visgaard - Produktionsassistent

items.text:
So kommst du in die Medien - Pressearbeit für Künstler:innen.

Im KÜNSTLERFAMILIE Themen-Talk mit Eva Primavesi am Mo 20. Juli 2026 (14-15 Uhr) dreht sich alles um die Sichtbarkeit in der Presse, was es bringt und wie man es in die Medien schafft.

PR-Expertin Eva Primavesi spricht darüber, wie Künstler:innen gezielt in die Medien kommen und sich eine starke öffentliche Präsenz aufbauen können. Sie zeigt, warum Pressearbeit kein Zufall ist, sondern eine strategische Entscheidung – und wie du sie für dich nutzen kannst, auch ohne Journalistenkontakte oder PR-Agentur.

Du erfährst unter anderem

▪️ warum Medien Sichtbarkeit verstärken und Türen öffnen
▪️ wie du deine Geschichte so erzählst, dass Journalisten aufmerksam werden
▪️ welche häufigen Fehler Künstler:innen in der PR machen
▪️ und wie du konkret ins Tun kommst, um erste Medienkontakte aufzubauen

Der Talk richtet sich an Künstler:innen, die bekannter werden, ihre Arbeit promoten und professionell sichtbar werden möchten.

Für KÜNSTLERFAMILIE-Mitglieder ist die Teilnahme am digitalen LIVE-Video-Talk kostenlos.

🙂 Noch nicht bei KÜNSTLERFAMILIE dabei?

Jetzt kostenlos registrieren ➡️ https://kuenstlerfamilie.com/registrieren

Fotocredits: Thomas Hofmann / Christian Ariel Heredia

A premium residential painting company based in Wake Forest, NC, is looking to hire a Female **actress (25 +)** for a short-form video shoot.

**The gig:**
* 5 selfie-style videos, 15–30 seconds each
* Script provided (you’ll bring natural delivery/personality, not memorization)
* Casual, talking-to-camera, UGC ad style — think iPhone selfie video, not a commercial set
* ( self-shoot) be able to download an App (Captions)

**Pay:** ($200) Flat rate for the full batch of 5 videos — paying job, contract + usage rights will be provided.

**Looking for:** Someone warm, relatable, and comfortable speaking directly to camera — homeowner energy, not “actor energy.”

To apply, comment or DM with:
* Your interest 

Looking to book quickly — thanks for your time!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID VERTICAL DRAMA**

Seeking **experienced actors** for a new **paid vertical drama** filming in **Atlanta and surrounding areas**.

**Casting Requirements:**
* Portray ages **21–35**
* Prefer experienced vertial actors
* Strong memorization skills with the ability to learn lines quickly
* Ability to deliver nuanced, emotionally grounded performances with strong character development
* Comfortable performing in intense dramatic scenes with supernatural elements
* Authentic acting style preferred — please avoid overly theatrical or caricature-style performances
* No visible tattoos, or tattoos must be easily covered for filming with makeup and/or costume.
* Preferably Atlanta local or will work as local

Characters:

-**Evelyn Har**t: Female, 24, lead, wedding planner, independant, pragmatic, grounded. Transforms from ordinary modern woman to a woman who decides who she is and her own fate.

-**Rowan Ashford**: Male, appears late 20s, lead, has been scorned from the woman he loves and is seeking revenge.

-**Daniel Brooks**: Male, late 20s, supporting, Evelyn's fiance, gentle, principled, always puts Evelyn first, unknowingly comes from a family who guards a dark secret.

-**Vivienne Laurent**: Female, 30s, supporting role, Queen Elara's closest confidant, loyal to the Queen.

-**Queen Elara**: Female, 20s, supporting role, comanding presence and stature.

-**The Obsidian Circle**: 5 supporting actors of an antagonist faction.

**Filming Dates:**
**July 27–31**

**To Submit:**

Please email the following to **[verticalsubmissions@gmail.com](mailto:verticalsubmissions@gmail.com)**:
* Resume
* Headshot (recommended)
* Demo reel (if available) and/or self-tape

**Submission Instructions:**
**Email submissions only. Please do not send personal/direct messages.**

Crew need not apply, we are fully crewed up. This is a casting call ONLY.

items.text:
Hello friends and fellow creatives!
My name is Megan. I am the main creative behind story haven studios. Story haven studios is a production company that is dedicated to bringing powerful stories to life. 

We are built on the belief that every great project begins with a compelling narrative.

We combine innovative storytelling, cinematic craftsmanship, and strategic vision to create content that inspires, entertains, and connects with audiences worldwide.

We transform ideas into immersive experiences, guiding projects from concept to completion with passion, professionalism, and creativity. Whether producing original content, collaborating with brands, or developing groundbreaking entertainment, our mission is to create stories that leave a lasting impact and turn imagination into reality.

With this we are in the preproduction phase of our first film. 

The chase is a fun action packed film about storm chasing and the budding relationships that grow over the weeks of storm chasing as a team. 

The story follows a master student and her professors chase/ research team as they try to collect date for a groundbreaking research paper. Tension grows as so do feelings between the professor and his student over the days of being stuck in a vehicle chasing storms. 

We have our main female character currently casted but we are in search of our male cast. 

These rolls will include being in the field during a storm chase from a safe distance. And potentially some driving as well to get some scenes. We strive to be as authentic as possible without the use of AI or CGI. This film will also be rated PG-13 and no explicit scenes will take place.

Male cast as follows. 

Ryker West (He/Him, 30s/40s, tall, green eyes, light brown to medium brown hair, well maintained facial hair.) Rugged, older, experienced, and undeniably attractive, with a commanding presence that makes him both intimidating and magnetic. His love of classic rock, storm chasing, and his "Twister Tamer" persona add to his adventurous, larger-than-life appeal. He is a meteorology professor and founder of the Tempest Trackers his storm chasing team. 

Joey Jensen (He/Him, 25, tall, blue eyes, medium length blonde wavy hair, deep southern accent, no facial hair.) - Joey is a fun loving larger than life comedic relief throughout the film. His heavy southern accent and vivacious personality make him that much more enjoyable. He is long time friends with Finley having gone to undergrad school with her. He is also in a budding relationship with Hawk who is a fellow storm chaser on the team. 

Diego "Hawk" Lopez (He/Him,30s/40s, Tall, Sunkissed skin, medium to dark brown hair, well-trimmed mustache and beard, brown eyes, physically fit.) - Diego is the best friend of Ryker. His calm professionalism keeps the team grounded during chases. He is the teams lead data analyst and researcher. In a budding relationship with Joey.

Ezra "The Pulse" Smith (He/Him, 30s/40s, tall, darker complexion, friendly brown eyes, dark brown/black hair.)- Ezra is the teams main communications liaison. A ladies' man at heart with a cool professionalism about him.

Provided is our linktree which you can find our socials. 

The audition form is currently live on there as well. 

https://linktr.ee/studiosstoryhaven?utm_source=linktree_profile_share&ltsid=ab4cc909-4e14-47d9-9b98-1f9af0014945

May be an image of text that says 'AStoryHavenStudio A Story Haven Studio production. THE Chase'

- are you SAG or NONSAG?
- age range

- are you available for the tentative work date? 
- attach a few RECENT, clear photos of yourself 
#gwciseeking #EXTRAS #youngpeople #clublife

DANCER OPEN CALL for Awakening at Wynn Las Vegas

*It is not necessary to submit your information before attending an open call*

Las Vegas on Monday, July 27, 2026
Millennium Dance Complex Las Vegas
6675 South Tenaya Way, suite 120
Las Vegas, NV 89113

Men at 10:00a, sign in at 9:30a
Ladies at 11:30a, sign in at 11:00a

Final Callbacks Will Be Held On Tuesday, July 28 in Las Vegas

Please bring a hard copy of your headshot/resume
Please wear form-fitting clothing, no baggy clothes
Flat shoes/sneakers please- ladies please also bring heels

21+ only please

May vary in height between 5'4" - 6'3" 

All performers must be willing to relocate to Las Vegas for a one-year contract (relocation package provided)

Benefits from eligible date of hire

Must be authorized to work in the U.S.

This is a non-union production

Please submit online if unable to attend an open call:

[Awakening.castingcrane.com](http://awakening.castingcrane.com/)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'AWAKENING NOW CASTING DANCERS OPEN AUDITION JULY JULY27TH 27TH MILLENNIUM DANCE COMPLEX LAS VEGAS'

items.text:
CASTING NOTICE - LEAD ACTRESS – PAID

TENTH MAN FILMS is seeking to film an Independent Feature Film – Funding Teaser Trailer.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17"

An ambitious independent feature film is seeking an exceptional lead actress for a professionally produced teaser trailer to support feature film financing.

"THE DEAD OUTSIDE ROOM 17" is a contained horror thriller with political suspense, blending the claustrophobic tension of "Buried" with the global stakes of "Contagion" and the relentless urgency of "24".

When a catastrophic zombie outbreak traps an international diplomat inside Room 17 of a failing hotel, she must stop the world descending into nuclear war using nothing but her intelligence, determination and a rapidly dying mobile phone—all without ever leaving the room.

The Role
This is a performance-led role for an actress capable of carrying the screen almost entirely through visual storytelling.
The teaser contains no dialogue, requiring subtle, truthful and emotionally engaging performance through expression, physicality and screen presence alone. The character is intelligent, composed and resourceful, but as events unfold she is pushed to her emotional and physical limits.

This is an exciting opportunity to become the face of a feature film currently entering the finance stage, with the intention of attaching cast and moving into full production following successful funding.

Casting Brief:
Female
Playing age: 35–55
Professional actress or experienced model with excellent on-camera presence.
Able to convey complex emotion without dialogue.
Strong dramatic ability and confident carrying scenes alone.
Previous film or television experience welcomed but not essential.

Shoot Details
Location: North West England
Shoot: One weekday afternoon/evening during July or August
Duration: Approximately 4–6 hours
Fee: £120

To Apply
Please submit:

Headshot.
Spotlight or Backstage profile.
Showreel (if available).
Current location (Cheshire based talent preferred, as there is no travel budget).
Weekday availability during July and August 2026 (TBC upon availability of cast actress/model).

Shortlisted applicants may be invited to attend an informal Zoom meeting before casting.

To contact, email MJB at tenthmanfilms@outlook.com

topComments.text: Email sent Michael, many thanks, Elle

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Stay on the line. Stayontheline.Holdthedoor H Hold the door. DEAD TSIDE ROOM'

items.text:
Hey guys, 

If you have a short that’s under 30mins long, we’d love to see it. Use the DISCOUNT code manc30 for 30% off our Manchester Global short film festival! 

This festival is not just about showcasing films but also creating a space for the future of cinema. We aim to help bloom the next generation of artists. 

Hosted at the Cultplex Cinema on the 17th October, we hope to create an intimate and personable experience for filmmakers new and old. If you or anyone you know has a film you’d like to share, follow the link below and submit today! 

https://filmfreeway.com/ManchesterInternational?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAdGRleARS8TRleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA8xMjQwMjQ1NzQyODc0MTQAAadQEcZ3PXs4_Nl7YTNrJrZEzbdZxpDHJwkhTnjy1AePffVEhJO1JPjYDnCDCA_aem_54w6tYhxxa0CUhyigp4BCA&utm_id=97760_v0_s00_e0_tv3_a1denni5ey3o21

items.text:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

items.summary:
**Are you ready to take your acting career to the next level?**

Scene 2 Screen Acting based in South Manchester and ran by Actor Andrew Ellis (This is England, The Walk-In, This is Going to Hurt) are celebrating our first birthday!

Over the past 12 months we have had 200+ actors through our doors, working together, learning new skills and sharpening existing skillsets. 

Best of all Andrew has a huge emphasis on practical learning and filming, meaning you come away each block with 2 showreel style scenes that are yours to keep! 

Our classes are based in the amazing Creative Space above Wythenshawe library, with a huge free carpark and great public transport links (we might be the only acting class you can fly too, should you want that is) also… We have air conditioning… which sounds nice right about now. 

Classes cost just £85 for a block of 4 two hour sessions. 

Drop us an email on: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) 

To enquire. 

Time to take your acting to the next level!

Resume/Bio about me:

I am a 2x Award winning lead actor

I have landed 86 roles with 80 of them being main character/lead roles in movies and shows (50 shown on imbd so far) that are currently production/or finished. I am currently top 28k rated on IMDb as well. These movies and shows will be premiering on NETFLIX, tubi , primevideo, Apple TV , peacock , paramount plus , Hulu , starz and one film headed to theaters and more! My debut movie “Forever loved” has over 3 MILLION VIEWS WORLDWIDE ON ALL PLATFORMS combined. My other leading role titled “Glistening in the snow” is currently on peacock and i’ve won an award for BEST LEADING MALE ACTOR IN FILM for this project! Also my leading role in the movie “Crossing the line” was #1 Recommended in the world on tubi for 2 weeks straight! I also won Best Actor Award for my leading role in the movie “Red Nit” That’s premiering soon. 

Here are some auditions of mine 

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/10HZUJxb35fIw2mJ0BYuRDZHLuAB5uv4P

Here are clips of me acting 

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1259FqA_PipOC-GmQDWS8HjE4nrAI-rFC

My goal is to win an Oscar one day! 🏆

STILL NEED 2-3 PARTS FOR "MYSTERY BOXES"
July 25, each part requiring 2-3 hours.

DAD/CUSTOMER 

Male, 30-55 years old

A dad looking to buy gifts for his wife and son in the laziest way possible.

BAD/OMINOUS MAN 

Male 25-60 years old

An ethereal character of vague origins. Imposing, scary.

REPORTER

Female, 20-40 years old

A news reporter on-site describing a situation.

Each role pays $15/hr.

Message me for any details. Looking for brief audition videos which I can provide lines for.

Thank you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

TITLE: Waiting on the Sky

GENRE: Drama/Comedy

LOGLINE: Three friends wait for the imminent alien arrival. On a rooftop patio they learn more about each other and uncover what they are really waiting for. 

ROLES:

Keely - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the alien hunter

Janice - A young woman in her 20s/30s, the supportive friend

Gordie - A young man in his 20s/30s, the uninvested doubter

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Denver Community Media. We are Denver’s community media access program and set up productions for students to get hands-on experience.

WRITER/DIRECTOR: Austin Anderson

PRODUCTION TYPE: Student Short Film

CONCTACT: Austin.Anderson@denvergov.org

RUN TIME: ~10 minutes

COMPENSATION: Unpaid

UNION STATUS: Non-Union

AUDITION INFORMATION: Self Tape or in-person at Denver Community Media

SHOOT DATES: July 16th and 17th from 5pm - 9pm. Must be available for both dates. 

Cheers!

items.text:
Looking for FEATURED EXTRAS for a short film shooting this Sunday!

Title: "The Remaking of Angela"

Logline: On the brink of losing everything, a broke fledgling writer guided by her hero, dives into a short film contest with her best friends only to find their amatuer efforts derailed by a longtime rival, and maybe even the law. 

When: Sunday, July 12th

8:30 AM - 11:30 AM

Who: This film features a black woman protagonist, and we're especially looking for diverse people of all ages for this scene! A good opportunity for aspiring actors, those new to Denver, or anyone looking to meet new people and network with local indie filmmakers.

Wear: The film is set in the mid-late 1990s. Anything that could pass for that era is preferred.

Come drop by for a few hours in the morning and have fun with us on set!

If interested, please fill out this form, and we'll be in touch to confirm:

sharedPost.text:
Du bist „UnSCHLAGERbar®“? Du bist „Sexy, Cool, Heiß & Trendy“?

Mit unseren exklusiven UnSCHLAGERbar-Shirts setzt du ein Statement – für gute Laune, unvergessliche Partynächte und die Liebe zum Schlager. Egal ob auf der nächsten Schlagerparty, dem Festival, beim Stadtfest oder einfach im Alltag: Mit diesem Shirt bist du garantiert UnSCHLAGERbar!

Erhältlich in verschiedenen Farben – so bunt wie die schönsten Hits und die besten Partys!

Weitere Informationen unter www.unschlagerbar.de oder https://dominchen.de/un-schlage-rbar/ 

Denn eins ist klar: Dieses Genre ist und bleibt UnSCHLAGERbar®! 

#UnSCHLAGERbar #Schlager #Party #GuteLaune #Festival #MusikVerbindet #TShirt #Merch #Lifestyle #Feiern #Schlagerliebe #Partystimmung #Kölschglück #Partyschlager
